name: test_request_with_invalid_token_behavior
description: GET /users/2 with a fake Bearer token — ReqRes accepts it for GET.
descriptionHtml: GET /users/2 with a fake Bearer token — ReqRes accepts it for GET.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Unexpected status with invalid token: 429
assert 429 in [200, 401]
 +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
statusTrace:
tests/test_auth.py:291: in test_request_with_invalid_token_behavior
    assert response.status_code in [200, 401], (
E   AssertionError: Unexpected status with invalid token: 429
E   assert 429 in [200, 401]
E    +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
